creator: kristinacors
caption: Like this aesthetic?! If you’re looking for more gems like this shop my New York City itinerary from the link in my bio. Each day is thoughtfully curated with 4 must see spots that are all within 25 minutes walking distance of each other. Every route is mapped out so you know exact walking and driving times, making it effortless to explore without backtracking or wasting time. #travelbucketlist #travelseries #nycitinerary #nychiddengems #travelcontentcreator

transcription.text: Don't go to New York City without visiting these three date night spots that look like they're straight out of a rom-com. If you're looking for a luxurious and intimate atmosphere, it doesn't get any better than this. Welcome to the Champagne and Caviar Bar at RH Guesthouse. It's the kind of space that will make you feel like you've just unlocked membership to an elite secret society. Now if you love New York City rooftops, the view from this restaurant is insane. There's no way you can't feel the magic of New York City with this jaw-dropping view of the New York City skyline. And the rooftop pool will have you feeling like you've just been invited to your billionaire friend's private apartment. And it's not just the view. Inside, the space is equally stunning. It's polished, airy, and effortlessly chic with floor-to-ceiling windows that let the cityscape become a part of your dinner. The name of this spot is Hudson Vue Rooftop. The third spot you have to check out is this restaurant. You can't go wrong with this dramatic greenery, Michelin-starred dishes, and high ceilings. It's called La Provino. Follow for more hidden gems around New York City. And if you like spots with this aesthetic, check out my 7-day New York City itinerary linked in my bio for more.
